title: ctenopteris subulatipinna
intro: Ctenopteris subulatipinna, also known as the New Zealand fan fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris subulatipinna include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although modern herbal preparations may also be available in capsule or topical form.
